title: Proof Techniques, Invariants, and Recurrence Bounds
description: Review a proposed optimization whose runtime and correctness claims lack evidence. Learners cumulatively produce a formal algorithm review packet through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use induction on input size or recursive structure to prove algorithm properties.
State initialization, maintenance, and termination for nontrivial loop invariants.
Use contradiction and exchange arguments where direct construction is awkward.
